name: funding-news-actor
title: Funding News Signal Parser
description: Parses funding announcements from RSS feeds and Crunchbase to detect growth signals

input.title: Input
input.description: Funding source filters and lookback settings.

crunchbaseApiKey.title: Crunchbase API Key
crunchbaseApiKey.description: Crunchbase API key used to query funding round data.

minRoundAmountUsd.title: Minimum round amount (USD)
minRoundAmountUsd.description: Ignore rounds below this USD amount.

roundTypes.title: Round types
roundTypes.description: Funding round types that should generate signals.

lookbackDays.title: Days to look back
lookbackDays.description: Only include funding news published within this many days.

fundingCategories.title: Funding categories
fundingCategories.description: Crunchbase category slugs to filter by (e.g. ['blockchain', 'artificial-intelligence']). Leave empty for all categories.
